detaileddescription.para: This function is declared weak so you can provide your own implementation. The default (in syn_port_stubs.c) enters an infinite loop.

parameterdescription.para: Source file name where the assertion failed.
Line number where the assertion failed.

briefdescription.para: Initialize a GPIO pin with the given mode.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, or an error code.

briefdescription.para: De-initialize a GPIO pin, returning it to its reset state.
Write a logical state to an output pin.
Read the current logical state of a pin.
Toggle the state of an output pin.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_UARTInstance instance, const uint8_t *data, size_t len, uint32_t timeout_ms)
memberdef.name: syn_port_uart_transmit

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_TIMEOUT if the timeout elapsed.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_UARTInstance instance, uint8_t *data, size_t len, size_t *received, uint32_t timeout_ms)
memberdef.name: syn_port_uart_receive

parameterdescription.para: Maximum number of bytes to receive.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_TIMEOUT if the timeout elapsed.
SYN_OK if a byte was received, SYN_TIMEOUT otherwise.

detaileddescription.para: Calls may be nested; the implementation must track nesting depth and only re-enable interrupts when the outermost critical section exits.
Must be called once for each corresponding syn_port_enter_critical().

briefdescription.para: Return the current system tick in milliseconds.

detaileddescription.para: This value must be monotonically increasing and should wrap naturally at UINT32_MAX. Typical sources: SysTick, a hardware timer, or an RTOS tick.

simplesect.para: Milliseconds since system start (or last wrap).

briefdescription.para: Blocking delay for the specified number of milliseconds.

detaileddescription.para: The implementation may busy-wait or yield to an RTOS. The delay must be at least ms milliseconds.
This function should not return. On Cortex-M, this is typically NVIC_SystemReset().

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t bus, const uint8_t *tx_buf, uint8_t *rx_buf, size_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_port_spi_transfer

detaileddescription.para: Simultaneously transmits from tx_buf and receives into rx_buf. Either buffer can be NULL for half-duplex operation.

parameterdescription.para: Receive buffer (NULL to discard received data).

briefdescription.para: Assert (pull low) an SPI chip-select pin.
Deassert (release high) an SPI chip-select pin.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t bus, uint8_t addr, const uint8_t *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_port_i2c_write

briefdescription.para: Write data to an I2C device.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on ACK, SYN_ERROR on NACK/timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t bus, uint8_t addr, uint8_t *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_port_i2c_read

briefdescription.para: Read data from an I2C device.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on ACK, SYN_ERROR on NACK/timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t bus, uint8_t addr, const uint8_t *tx_data, size_t tx_len, uint8_t *rx_data, size_t rx_len)
memberdef.name: syn_port_i2c_write_read

detaileddescription.para: Sends a write (typically a register address) followed by a repeated start and read. This is the most common I2C transaction pattern.

parameterdescription.para: Start address of the sector (must be sector-aligned).

detaileddescription.para: Flash must be erased before writing (writes can only clear bits). The implementation should handle any alignment requirements.

briefdescription.para: Get the sector size for the given address.

simplesect.para: Raw ADC value (resolution depends on platform).

briefdescription.para: Get the ADC resolution in bits.
Get the ADC reference voltage in millivolts.
Set PWM duty cycle with fine resolution.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable, false to disable.

briefdescription.para: Enter low-power mode. Implement for your platform.

detaileddescription.para: For Cortex-M: SYN_SLEEP_LIGHT → WFI, SYN_SLEEP_DEEP → STOP mode. Must return when an interrupt wakes the MCU.

briefdescription.para: Configure a pin for interrupt generation.
Enable interrupt on a configured pin.
Disable interrupt on a pin (without deconfiguring).
Clear pending interrupt flag for a pin.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t port, uint32_t id, bool extended, const uint8_t *data, uint8_t dlc)
memberdef.name: syn_port_can_send

simplesect.para: true if frame was queued for transmission.
true if a frame was received.

parameterdescription.para: Filter mask (1 = must match, 0 = don't care).

briefdescription.para: Weak default implementations for all port functions.

detaileddescription.para: Compile this file into your project to catch unimplemented port functions at runtime. Each stub calls syn_assert_failed() with a descriptive message, making it immediately obvious which function you forgot to implement.
If you provide a strong definition of a function in your platform port file, the linker will silently discard the weak stub.
You can also omit this file entirely and rely on the linker to report unresolved symbols at link time — this is a perfectly valid approach.
